description: WFG approval-to-operational-topic routing. WFG Approvals remains the decision hub; accepted approvals should trigger factual follow-up updates in the appropriate operational topic.
message_rule: Post only factual process status. Do not claim outreach/submission occurred until the downstream action actually ran and was verified.

bid_no_bid.label: Bid / No-Bid
bid_no_bid.purpose: Beginner-fit scoring, eligibility, time/risk assessment, and pursue/pass/watch recommendations.

business_admin.label: Business Admin / Company Setup
business_admin.purpose: LLC/admin, SAM.gov/UEI, insurance/bonding, domain/email, bank/EIN/accounting, and certification planning.

compliance.label: Solicitation / Compliance
compliance.purpose: Solicitation reading, compliance matrices, clauses, forms, deadlines, instructions, and amendments.

opportunity_intake.label: Opportunity Intake / Capture
opportunity_intake.purpose: New SAM links, selected opportunities, intake status, source docs, and opportunity folders.

outreach.label: Subcontractor Sourcing
outreach.purpose: Local subcontractor candidates, quote request drafts, outreach approval follow-up, quote tracking, and verification status.

performance.label: Contract Performance / Project Controls
performance.purpose: Post-award kickoff, schedule tracking, RFIs, changes, closeout, invoices, and subcontractor performance.

price.label: Pricing
price.purpose: Quote leveling, markup/contingency, limitations-on-subcontracting checks, pricing worksheet status, and final-price approval follow-up.

proposal.label: Proposal
proposal.purpose: Technical proposal drafts, capabilities sections, past-performance handling, and proposal package assembly.

submission.label: Submission
submission.purpose: Final submission checklist, portal/email instructions, submission approval follow-up, and proof archive.

system_ops.label: WFG System / Marcus Ops
system_ops.purpose: Automation status, cron jobs, routing tests, Hermes/Kanban issues, system errors, and blockers.
